title: Specialty coffee cafe in Kamianets-Podilskyi
description: Wake Cup is a local cafe for specialty coffee, fresh pastries, takeaway coffee, and easy everyday meetings.

intro.title: A warm stop for coffee and pastries
intro.text: Wake Cup serves espresso-based drinks, filter coffee, seasonal cafe drinks, pastries, and simple food in Kamianets-Podilskyi. Guests can stay for a quiet table or take coffee with them while moving through the city.

sections.title: Coffee
items: Espresso, cappuccino, latte, and seasonal drinks
Milk and non-dairy options when available

sections.title: Pastries
items: Fresh pastries and desserts for coffee breaks
Sweet options for dine-in or takeaway
Seasonal treats and simple cafe favorites
Easy pairings with espresso and milk drinks

sections.title: Takeaway
items: Takeaway coffee for walks, work, and errands
Pastry boxes and small gifts when available

sections.title: Cafe atmosphere
items: Warm interior for short breaks and friendly meetings
Comfortable tables for coffee, dessert, and conversation
Terrace seating when season and weather allow
Local urban cafe mood in Kamianets-Podilskyi

service.title: Our service
service.text: The Wake Cup team keeps coffee, pastry, and takeaway service friendly, clear, and easy to understand for locals and city guests.
